narrative:
10 Ohio Senate district has 228,849 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -6.0% D−R vs -23.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
